title: DEERC Brushless Extreme High Speed RC Truck, 1:16 4X4 RTR Fast RC Cars for Adults, Max 45mph All Terrains RC Monster Truck, Off Road Hobby Electric Vehicle Gift for Boys, 2 Battery
features: 【Superb Brushless Thrill】Powered by hobby 2845 4200KV, 4 pole high-torque motor with metal heatsink & cooling fans and equipped with the professional independent smart 2S/3S 45A IPX5 ESC and the 2.2kgf.cm in torque force 3-wire servo! The combination provides incredible torque, acceleration and speed.

【Smoother Rides, Superior Performance】Aluminum oil-filled shocks and the tire (Pre-mounted sponge inserted) help absorb bumps and reduce vibrations to improve maneuverability and stability, resulting in smoother rides over bumpy and uneven terrain. It improves overall suspension performance and increases the truck's ability to handle jumps and obstacles. With the wheelie bar comes with 4WD truck, you can get all the perfect jumps and stunts.

【Ultra Metal Driving System】The ultra metal driving system is designed to enhance the truck's strength and stability.Metal gears and metal differential & metal driving shaft better distribute power to achieve a perfect 4X4, in which the 5.5MM diameter axle and M4 nuts contributed. All is engineered to take full advantage of the electronics’ power and ensure its long service time.

【Hobbyist Grade & Real All Terrain】Brushless motor in the remote control truck generates great horsepower to fulfilled the speed and racing desires. With 2.2KG high torque servo and proportional steering & throttle, this hobby rc car is able to conquer much more difficult terrains, running smoothly and handsomely at top speed in all terrains.

【Safer, High-capacity Li-po Batteries】This racing rc car is power by improved modular Li-po battery whose case is made of flame-retardant materials for much safer charging and using! With 2 li-po batteries, you can get extended 40 mins playing time.
description: Product Description Previous page 25C Modular LiPo Batteries Flame-retardant material shell, it is puncture proof and anti-collision! 40 mins driving time. Full Metal CVD & Metal Gears ect. 5.5mm diameter driving shaft & all the metal parts for the driving system make it durable & tougher! Brushless High-rate Discharge Superior 4200KV brushless motor with aluminum heat sink & cooling fan, stable and robust. Aluminum Capped Smooth Shocks Bumping road, jumping stunts is like driving on a smooth road, come feel it! Efficient Discharge Usage Durable and ensure the power from engine and make sure this monster truck turn smoothly. Next page 1 Flame-Retardant Batteries 2 Metal Driving System 3 Brushless & Cooling Fan 4 Oli-filled Shocks 5 Metal Differential Previous page IPX5 45A ESC Smart 45A ESC compatibel with 2S, 3S li-po batteries, get the speed you want, it is stable and efficient with low voltage cutoff, and anti-block protection. High Torque Servo System It is the 2.1kgf.cm in torque force 3-wire servo, nimble steering, vigorous, Proportional, and responsive. Stronger Chassis The solid-built honeycomb chassis is strong enough to withstand the impact of this brushless monster truck. Proportional Steering & Throttle It is a full proportional steering and throttle 2.4G control system. Next page
